Table	Create Table
uploadedFiles	CREATE TABLE `uploadedFiles` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `filename` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `originalFilename` varchar(255) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `fileType` varchar(100) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `fileSize` int(11) NOT NULL,

  `s3Url` varchar(1024) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `uploadedBy` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,

  `description` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */,
